privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly define all required SeisComP magnitude configuration parameters for both ML and mb processing. It requires a mock 'GYM seismological center' pipeline with standard SeisComP syntax, correctly enforced by verifier.py against the exported system configuration files.
